methods.description: Process for growing Chaetoceros muelleri cultures at different pH levels and maintaining them under controlled conditions.

steps.description: Chaetoceros muelleri was grown at pH 6.8, 7.4, 7.9, and 8.2.
steps.searchable_summary: grow cultures at specified pH levels

steps.description: Batch cultures were grown in artificial seawater salt base to which nutrients, trace metals, and vitamins were added as an f/2 enrichment.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and enrich artificial seawater for culture growth

steps.description: Cultures were grown at 20°C under a photosynthetic photon flux density of 50 μmol m−2 s−1, with a 14-hour daily light period.
steps.searchable_summary: maintain cultures under specified temperature and light conditions

steps.description: pH was maintained within the cultures using a biological buffer (25 mM HEPES) and by daily titration with a small amount (<100 μL) of 1 M HCl.
steps.searchable_summary: maintain pH using buffer and titration

methods.description: Procedures for monitoring growth and sampling cultures for various analyses.

steps.description: Growth each day was followed in the cultures using in vivo chlorophyll fluorescence measured in a small sample (200 μL) using a spectrofluorometer plate reader.
steps.searchable_summary: measure chlorophyll fluorescence to monitor growth

steps.description: The six replicate cultures grown at each pH were extensively sampled during exponential growth phase on day 5.
steps.searchable_summary: sample cultures during exponential growth phase

steps.description: Samples were taken for cell counts and chlorophyll a concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze samples for cell counts and chlorophyll a

steps.description: The maximum quantum efficiency of photosystem II (Fv/Fm) in Chaetoceros muelleri was measured in dark adapted (2 hours) cultures using a pulse amplitude-modulated (PAM) fluorometer.

methods.description: Method for measuring carbohydrates in the cultures using phenol-sulfuric acid assay.

steps.description: Carbohydrates were measured using the phenol-sulfuric acid assay calibrated with D-glucose.
steps.searchable_summary: measure carbohydrates using phenol-sulfuric acid assay

methods.description: Calculation of biomass and growth rate from chlorophyll fluorescence data.

steps.description: Growth rate derived from changes in in vivo chlorophyll fluorescence between days 2 and 5.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate growth rate from chlorophyll fluorescence data

steps.description: Biomass is expressed as diatom concentration (cells mL−1) and chlorophyll a (chl.a) concentration (μg L−1).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate biomass from cell and chlorophyll a concentrations
